title: BIO-TECHNE TO ACQUIRE NAMOCELL
text: MINNEAPOLIS and MOUNTAIN VIEW, Mo. , June 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ:TECH), a global life sciences company providing innovative tools and bioactive reagents for the research and clinical diagnostic communities, today announced it has reached an agreement to acquire Namocell, Inc. Bio-Techne anticipates the acquisition to close in the first quarter of its fiscal 2023.

title: Amy Zhang: this ‘underrated' biotech firm can weather a recession
text: The iShares Biotechnology ETF (IBB) is still down nearly 25% for the year, but Alger's portfolio manager says there are opportunities within this space that can weather a recession.
